items.title: What can Hearts pick from debris of ongoing summer of hurt?
items.summary: There's crashing back to Earth with a bang, and there's whatever Hearts fans have been going through since 16 May.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Zlatan Critiques Spain's Failure To Defend Teammates After Post-Final Brawl
items.summary: Zlatan Ibrahimovic took aim at Leandro Paredes and Spain's players after the World Cup final's turbulent end in New Jersey.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Blast champions Northants make winning cup start
items.summary: T20 Blast winners Northamptonshire beat Warwickshire in their opening match in the One-Day Cup as Notts, Surrey, Hampshire and Middlesex also win.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
